description_long: This is a modern, boxy chaise with a deep olive green upholstery and a compact, cubic form. The seat is generously padded, and the backrest and armrests are of equal height, creating a cozy, enclosed seating area. The backrest and inner sides feature subtle tufting with buttons, adding a touch of classic elegance to the otherwise minimalist design. The chaise stands on four short, dark wooden legs that are slightly tapered, providing stability and a slight elevation from the ground. The upholstery appears to be a soft fabric, likely velvet or microfiber, with a matte finish and no visible patterns aside from the tufting. This piece would be suitable for urban parks, public lounges, or modern outdoor seating areas.
description: A boxy, olive green chaise with tufted backrest and armrests of equal height, standing on short, dark wooden legs. The upholstery is soft and matte, with a minimalist yet elegant design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the deep seat, tufted backrest, and both armrests, highlighting the enclosed, inviting seating area.
description_view_1: Left side view displays the solid, continuous armrest and the short, dark legs beneath the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the plain, unadorned back panel and the symmetry of the armrests and backrest.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest and the subtle texture of the upholstery.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, straight, and of equal height to the armrests, featuring subtle button tufting for a classic touch. It is thickly padded and forms a continuous, boxy enclosure with the armrests.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both left and right armrests are present, matching the height and thickness of the backrest, and are straight and boxy in style.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and slightly tapered, made of dark wood with a simple, unadorned finish. They provide a sturdy base and a slight elevation from the ground.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid olive green fabric with a matte finish and features button tufting on the backrest and inner sides. No other patterns or surface treatments are visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, thick seat cushion integrated into the base, with the backrest and armrests padded as part of the main structure. No loose or additional cushions are visible.
